SEARCH
Package model

Class Villager

java.lang.Object
model.Villager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Villager extends Object implements Serializable
Villager class for taking care of villagers in the village
Author:
GaboraBrave
See Also:

      lastname - Villager last name

      public Villager(String firstname, String lastname, int personalpoints)
      3 argument constructor;
      Parameters:
      firstname - Villager's first name (String)
      lastname - Villager's last name (String)
      personalpoints - Villager's personal points (int)

      public void setLastName(String lastname)
      Sets the last name of the selected Villager
      Parameters:
      lastname - the Villager's last name

    • setPoints

      public void setPoints(int points)
      Sets the points of the selected Villager, overwriting the past set points
      Parameters:
      points - the Villager's first name

    • addPoints

      public void addPoints(int points)
      adds points to the curent amount of point of the selected villager
      Parameters:
      points - the number of points that will be added

    • subtractPoints

      public void subtractPoints(int points)
      removes points from the curent amount of point of the selected villager
      Parameters:
      points - the number of points that will be removed

    • checkPoints

      public boolean checkPoints(int required)
      checks if the Villager has more personal points than the parameter requiredpoints --> for trade offers
      Parameters:
      required - required points (to finish a trade) (int)
      Returns:
      ture or false

    • isAboveAverage

      public boolean isAboveAverage(int averagepoints)
      checks if the Villager' personal points are below or above all the villagers' personal point average
      Parameters:
      averagepoints - required points (to finish a trade) (int)
      Returns:
      ture or false

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String value of the concatenated fields "[" + personalpoints + "] " + firstname + " " + lastname
